3273270.name: DAWN: CALM BEFORE THE STORM - DEMO
3273270.description:
This demo is a precursor to the events of DAWN (COMING SOON).

-

In DAWN: CALM BEFORE THE STORM DEMO, you play as Trey.

A handyman for the now powerless - and dead silent - facility that, you, now find yourself waking up alone in.

With the keys needed for accessing the rest of the building being top-side, for now, you must venture into the nearby storage room, access what you can and don't forget to turn on your flashlight.



You'll need it, for once you reach the roof; You soon realize this isn't just another ordinary shift - something happened. And all while Trey slept.

Reach the roof, restore power to the building, take in your surroundings, familiarize yourself with controls, and enjoy the peace while it lasts.

For soon, The DAWN will reveal itself. And you'll regret ever turning the lights back on.

-

WITNESS THE DAWN! A new horror stirs in The American West. It isn’t an ordinary night. The storm outside was just the start. The wind. The rain. An omen of things to come.

---

All rights reserved - Affinity Gameworks 2024.
